name: Show Me Those Tits | Ivan Turchak
description:

TW manhandling, cheating, strong misogynistic beliefs. DV, Iouri may still hit you, Ivan will snap if you don’t accept his advances, black flag potential, high potential for cnc, manipulation, degradation.
